mapper.select: SELECT resume_id AS resumeId, status AS status, COALESCE(position_type, 'BACKEND_JAVA') AS positionType, resume_overall_score AS resumeScore, evaluation_overall_score AS evaluationScore, COALESCE(question_count, 0) AS questionCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM v_resume_history ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT resume_id AS resumeId, status AS status, COALESCE(position_type, 'BACKEND_JAVA') AS positionType, resume_overall_score AS resumeScore, evaluation_overall_score AS evaluationScore, COALESCE(question_count, 0) AS questionCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM v_resume_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
